title: cymbopogon flexuosus
intro: Cymbopogon flexuosus, commonly known as East Indian lemongrass, is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia and India, belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon flexuosus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and providing relief from fever and pain, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Cymbopogon flexuosus can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
